title: Mergen tasks state
description: Machine-readable mirror of the post-verification completion state of tasks.md.

status.description: done corresponds to a verifier-confirmed [X], pending to [ ]. blocked is a task an unmet dependency or external wait holds back. conditional is a verified pass under a stated caveat the human still owns, the tasks-state mirror of the report's conditional_pass verdict.

test_task.description: A concrete repo-relative test path. The pattern is the declarative mirror of verify_core.safe_repo_relative_path: it rejects a leading '-' (a pytest option), a leading separator, a drive (C:\...), a '..' traversal segment, and glob metacharacters. The Python validator is the enforcement; this pattern documents it for a generic schema validator.
